evidence_summary: Post-APSB25-94 remediation: curator has confirmed a credential harvester written in PHP was dropped via Adobe Commerce file upload. Operator requests an LMD custom signature that fingerprints the curl-to-pastebin exfiltration pattern (curl|wget followed by pastebin.com or raw.githubusercontent.com in shell_exec or system calls) and a ClamAV HEX signature for the same payload.
